  AND b.owner_name = 'Brian & Maureen Hayes'

  AND v.description LIKE '%improper%storage%equipment%utensils%linens%'

records.question: Which businesses located in San Francisco with an owner address at 388 Potrero Ave. have violations categorized as Low Risk?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT businesses.business_id FROM businesses
JOIN violations ON businesses.business_id = violations.business_id
WHERE businesses.city = 'San Francisco' AND violations.risk_category = 'Low Risk' AND businesses.owner_address = '388 Potrero Ave.'

FROM businesses b
JOIN violations v ON b.business_id = v.business_id
WHERE b.city = 'San Francisco'
  AND b.owner_address = '388 Potrero Ave.'
  AND v.risk_category = 'Low Risk'

records.question: Which businesses owned by La Baguette, LLC in Palo Alto with zip code 94304 had low-risk violations for unclean or degraded floors, walls, or ceilings during routine unscheduled inspections on or before 2014-05-30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT businesses.business_id FROM businesses
JOIN inspections ON businesses.business_id = inspections.business_id
JOIN violations ON businesses.business_id = violations.business_id
WHERE inspections.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled' AND businesses.owner_name = 'La Baguette, LLC' AND businesses.owner_zip = '94304' AND violations.risk_category = 'Low Risk' AND violations.description = 'Unclean or degraded floors walls or ceilings' AND inspections.date <= '2014-05-30' AND businesses.owner_city = 'Palo Alto'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.business_id
FROM businesses b
JOIN inspections i ON b.business_id = i.business_id
JOIN violations v ON b.business_id = v.business_id AND i.date = v.date
WHERE b.owner_name = 'La Baguette, LLC'
  AND b.city = 'Palo Alto'
  AND b.owner_zip = '94304'
  AND v.risk_category = 'Low Risk'
  AND v.description LIKE '%unclean%floor%'
     OR v.description LIKE '%unclean%wall%'
     OR v.description LIKE '%unclean%ceiling%'
     OR v.description LIKE '%degraded%floor%'
     OR v.description LIKE '%degraded%wall%'
     OR v.description LIKE '%degraded%ceiling%'
  AND i.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled'
  AND i.date <= '2014-05-30'
